name: Pathway → GWAS Gene
_prompt: Name each dementia-genetics cluster. Every COARSE label is a molecular pathway (peers: 'Lipid Metabolism', 'Endocytosis', ...). Every FINE label is the single most distinctive GWAS gene/target of that cluster, a peer of the others. Labels within a tier must be mutually exclusive. Note: APOE recurs across clusters and several clusters share top genes, so fine gene labels are the least clean of the three lenses — this is expected.
